tasks.title: SaaS Bot Deployer - Multi-workspace Slack + Multi-account Telegram

updates.message: Tracking started. Monitoring joel_openclaw mesh messages for progress.

Confirmed: 5 bots responsive (fb_group_hunter, sales_openclaw, ai_cofounder, joel_openclaw, sp_orchestrator). 7 silent (outbound-monster, bas-assistant, marketing-openclaw, soe-openclaw, brain-predictions, bizclass-flights, advisor-brian).
Mission Control removed. Building custom dashboard with tasks.json backend.
